items.title: Settings: add board-to-settings advanced-controls shortcut card
items.description: UI strike follow-up to keep board focused while preserving quick access to advanced controls.

items.title: Board UX: add board-header active-filter count pill beside reset controls

items.description: Improve discoverability of applied board constraints.

items.title: Roadmap: SPA extract board-only shell from monolithic dashboard
items.description: Make /board render focused workspace only; move inspector/explorer/admin to dedicated routes.

items.title: Board UX: move board filters into sticky compact toolbar on /board
items.description: Reduce vertical clutter while keeping quick-clear chips visible.

items.title: Board UX: add assignee/project filter dropdown quick-clear chips in board header

Board UX: keyboard shortcut hints persist after column reorder submit
Board UX: keyboard-accessible column reordering controls with aria-live feedback
Board UX: add optimistic rollback messaging for column move failures
Board UX: board-card quick controls for assignee/project/priority/due
items.description: Autonomous loop follow-up for board-only operability

items.title: Board UX: drag-drop column moves with optimistic persistence + rollback
items.description: Autonomous loop follow-up for board-only operability

items.title: Board UX: inline task edit/delete controls directly on board cards
items.description: Autonomous loop follow-up for board-only operability

items.title: Board UX: persist /board filter presets as shareable URL templates
items.description: Save/load reusable filter combinations directly from board workspace.

items.title: Board UX: make active filter badges removable inline from /board
items.description: Single-click clear controls on each active filter badge to reduce route-hopping.

items.title: Unblock #52: capture live worker-outcome artifact and set timeout threshold
items.description: Run one live worker-outcome capture and document threshold decision for #34/#52.

items.title: Board UX: show active filter summary badges above lanes
items.description: Display compact chips for active board filters to avoid hidden constraints during triage.

items.title: Board UX: persist board filter presets as URL templates

items.description: Allow benchmark_task_board.py to run a subset of endpoints via CLI so operators can isolate regressions quickly.
